declarations.description:
A Lit ReactiveController that simplifies consuming context in a child component.
This controller manages the lifecycle of the ContextConsumer and updates the host
when the context value changes.
declarations.name: ContextConsumerController

members.name: consumer
members.default: new ContextConsumer(host, { context, callback: (value: ContextType<Context<string, T>>) => { this._value = value as T; // Request an update when the context value changes this.host.requestUpdate(); }, subscribe: true, })

members.name: hostConnected
members.description:
Called when the host element is connected to the DOM.
Ensures the consumer is active.

members.name: hostDisconnected
members.description:
Called when the host element is disconnected from the DOM.
Cleans up the consumer to prevent memory leaks.

members.name: value
members.description:
Gets the current consumed context value.
Returns undefined if the context is not available.

members.name: hasValue
members.description: Checks if the context is available (has a value).

declarations.description:
A Lit ReactiveController that simplifies providing context from a host component.
This controller manages the lifecycle of the ContextProvider from
declarations.name: ContextProviderController

members.name: hostConnected
members.description:
Called when the host element is connected to the DOM.
Ensures the provider is active.

members.name: hostDisconnected
members.description:
Called when the host element is disconnected from the DOM.
Cleans up the provider to prevent memory leaks.

members.name: setValue
members.description: Sets a new context value and notifies all consumers.

members.name: updateValue

parameters.name: updater
parameters.description: A function that receives the current value and returns a new value

members.description:
Updates the context value by calling a function with the current value.
Useful for immutable updates.

declarations.name: createContext

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: A unique string identifier for the context

declarations.description:
Creates a context key and associates it with a TypeScript type.
This utility ensures all contexts are created in a standardized way.

A Lit ReactiveController that manages focus trapping within a specified element.
This controller is essential for modal accessibility as required for dialog components.
declarations.name: FocusTrapController

members.name: hostConnected
members.description:
Called when the host element is connected to the DOM.
Currently unused but required by ReactiveController interface.

members.name: hostDisconnected
members.description:
Called when the host element is disconnected from the DOM.
Ensures cleanup of the focus trap to prevent memory leaks.

members.name: activate
members.description:
Activates the focus trap on the host element.
Initializes the focus-trap library and starts trapping focus.

members.name: deactivate
members.description:
Deactivates the focus trap.
Stops trapping focus and cleans up the focus trap instance.

declarations.description:
A Lit ReactiveController that manages dynamic positioning of floating elements
relative to anchor elements using Floating UI.

This controller is essential for positioning non-modal components like Popover and Tooltip.
It uses Floating UI's `computePosition` function with middleware (`offset`, `flip`, `shift`)
to calculate optimal positioning and automatically updates the position on scroll, resize,
and other environmental changes.
declarations.name: PositioningController

members.name: setElements

parameters.name: anchor
parameters.description: The element that serves as the reference point for positioning

parameters.name: floater
parameters.description: The element that will be positioned relative to the anchor

members.description: Sets the anchor and floating elements for positioning.

members.name: updatePosition
members.description:
Calculates and applies the floating element's position relative to the anchor.
Uses Floating UI's computePosition with offset, flip, and shift middleware.

members.name: hostConnected
members.description:
Called when the host element is connected to the DOM.
Starts automatic position updates when elements are set.

members.name: hostDisconnected
members.description:
Called when the host element is disconnected from the DOM.
Ensures cleanup to prevent memory leaks.

members.name: start
members.description:
Starts automatic position updates.
Should be called after setElements() to begin dynamic repositioning.

declarations.description:
A Lit ReactiveController that synchronizes a state value to the host element's
`data-state` attribute. This is useful for headless components that need to
expose their internal state for styling purposes.
declarations.name: StateSyncController

members.name: hostConnected
members.description:
Called when the host element is connected to the DOM.
Initializes the data-state attribute.

members.name: hostUpdate
members.description:
Called during the host element's update lifecycle.
Updates the data-state attribute if the open state has changed.

members.name: updateState
members.description: Updates the host element's data-state attribute based on the current state.

declarations.name: tokens
declarations.default: css` :host { /* Spacing */ --spacing-1: 0.25rem; --spacing-1-5: 0.375rem; --spacing-2: 0.5rem; --spacing-3: 0.75rem; --spacing-4: 1rem; --spacing-5: 1.25rem; --spacing-6: 1.5rem; --spacing-8: 2rem; --spacing-10: 2.5rem; --spacing-12: 3rem; /* Border Radius */ --radius-sm: calc(var(--radius, 0.625rem) - 0.25rem); --radius-md: calc(var(--radius, 0.625rem) - 0.125rem); --radius-lg: var(--radius, 0.625rem); --radius-xl: calc(var(--radius, 0.625rem) + 0.25rem); --radius-2xl: calc(var(--radius, 0.625rem) + 0.5rem); --radius-full: 9999px; /* Transitions */ --transition-fast: 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); --transition-base: 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); --transition-normal: 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); --transition-slow: 500ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); /* Keyframe Animation Timing */ --animation-spin-duration: 600ms; --animation-spin-easing: linear; --animation-pulse-duration: 2s; --animation-pulse-easing: cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.6, 1); --animation-caret-duration: 1s; --animation-caret-easing: steps(1); /* Shadows */ --shadow-sm: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); --shadow-md: 0 4px 6px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 2px 4px -2px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1); --shadow-lg: 0 10px 15px -3px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 4px 6px -4px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1); --shadow-xl: 0 20px 25px -5px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1), 0 8px 10px -6px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.1); /* Typography */ --font-size-xs: 0.75rem; --font-size-sm: 0.875rem; --font-size-base: 1rem; --font-size-lg: 1.125rem; --font-size-xl: 1.25rem; --font-size-2xl: 1.5rem; --font-size-3xl: 1.875rem; --font-size-4xl: 2.25rem; /* Font Weights */ --font-normal: 400; --font-medium: 500; --font-semibold: 600; --font-bold: 700; /* Font Family */ --font-sans: system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; --font-mono: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, 'SF Mono', Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', 'Courier New', monospace; /* Line Heights */ --leading-none: 1; --leading-tight: 1.25; --leading-snug: 1.375; --leading-normal: 1.5; --leading-relaxed: 1.625; --leading-loose: 2; /* Letter Spacing */ --tracking-tight: -0.025em; --tracking-widest: 0.1em; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { :host { --transition-fast: 0ms; --transition-base: 0ms; --transition-normal: 0ms; --transition-slow: 0ms; } } @keyframes shadcn-fade-in { from { opacity: 0; } } @keyframes shadcn-zoom-in { from { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.95); } } @keyframes shadcn-slide-in-from-right { from { transform: translateX(100%); } } @keyframes shadcn-slide-in-from-left { from { transform: translateX(-100%); } } @keyframes shadcn-slide-in-from-top { from { transform: translateY(-100%); } } @keyframes shadcn-slide-in-from-bottom { from { transform: translateY(100%); } } `

declarations.description:
The dialog trigger component that opens the dialog when clicked.
Wraps its slotted content and adds click handling to open the dialog.
declarations.name: DialogTrigger

declarations.description:
The dialog title component.
A shell component that renders its slotted content.
Future implementations may handle accessibility attributes and ARIA labeling.
declarations.name: DialogTitle

declarations.description:
The dialog portal component.
A shell component that renders its slotted content.
Future implementations may handle portal rendering to a different DOM location.
declarations.name: DialogPortal

declarations.description:
The dialog overlay component.
A shell component that renders its slotted content.
Future implementations may handle overlay styling and click-to-close behavior.
declarations.name: DialogOverlay

declarations.description:
The dialog description component.
A shell component that renders its slotted content.
Used for providing additional context about the dialog's purpose.
Automatically linked to the dialog via aria-describedby.
declarations.name: DialogDescription

declarations.description:
The dialog content component that conditionally renders its slotted content
based on the dialog's open state.

The popover context key.

Acts as a context provider for child components and handles positioning.
